reasoning: Koren, your key limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. The power drop from 5-min to 20-min is higher than normal, indicating an underdeveloped aerobic base. Let's target this by doing over-unders which will help mimic the sustained efforts required for the Sundance → Cascade Springs climb, crucial for the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate 3 minutes at 242-256W and 4 minutes at 201-218W, repeat for 5 sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
